architecture.routing: Next.js App Router (single page.tsx with module switching)

roles.admin: Full access to all modules + configuration
roles.gerente: Operational modules (vender, ventas, inventario, informes, etc.)

patterns.supabaseClient: Singleton via getClient() in each service
patterns.errorHandling: throw Error in services, try/catch in components
patterns.sedeScope: All queries filtered by sede_id from useSede() context
patterns.kardexTrigger: DO NOT manually insert Kardex — UPDATE venta.estado to COMPLETADA triggers DB function
patterns.componentDecomposition: Max ~200 lines per component. Extract hooks for logic, types for interfaces

testing.mockStrategy: Supabase client mocked globally in setup.ts

forbidden: Do NOT use Bootstrap or jQuery
Do NOT import Google Fonts via CDN link tags (use next/font)
Do NOT set ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config
Do NOT manually insert Kardex records
Do NOT use sedeId = '1' or any non-UUID value
Do NOT create components larger than 300 lines without decomposing
